stages.name: setup
stages.message: Hallmark cloned from github.com/Nutlope/hallmark (shallow); SKILL.md read; references loaded; operation=build; no /app/assets uploads

stages.name: operation
stages.message: Ran build per SKILL.md: pre-flight (no signals), design-context inferred (editorial/Letter/Almanac), N6 masthead + Ft4 colophon picked, genre=editorial, typography-only enrichment, page built

stages.name: output_contract
stages.message: index.html + styles.css + tokens.css + screenshot.png written to /app/results; relative hrefs confirmed; Hallmark stamp on line 1 of styles.css; results clean (no node_modules/clone/.hallmark)

stages.name: render
stages.message: screenshot.png rendered at 1440×900 @2× via Playwright/Chromium; warm cream paper and terracotta accent visible; Fraunces + Newsreader fonts loaded from Google Fonts; 574 166 bytes

stages.name: slop_test
stages.message: 58/58 gates passed after one revision pass (gates 24/26/27/39/41 fixed); pre-emit critique P5 H5 E4 S5 R5 V4

stages.name: results_hygiene
stages.message: No node_modules/, no hallmark clone, no .hallmark/ directory in /app/results; all scratch work in /app/work

results.pre_emit_critique: P5 H5 E4 S5 R5 V4
